---
title: &TITLE "Name"
last:
first:
people_group: "pi | postdoc | gradstudent | alumni"
email:
education:
  - "Degree | Institution | Year"
subtitle: "Role"
description: ""
image: avatar.jpg
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:email@example.org
---

<hr>

:::{#about}

Short bio here.

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

:::
